title: Night Witcher
description: Adds a new enchantment called Night Witcher that grants permanent night vision while worn.
body:
![night witcher](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71eebdb3f725b3d831f2d5365dec9adb40aa6efc.png)
# Night Witcher Enchantment 
A utility mod that introduces a powerful new enchantment designed to enhance your exploration and nighttime survival. No more fumbling for torches or carrying stacks of potions in the dark.

## Main Features:
Night Witcher Enchantment: A specialized enchantment that can be applied specifically to Helmets.  

Automatic Night Vision: Once equipped, the helmet grants the wearer constant Night Vision, allowing you to see clearly in total darkness.  

Real-time Detection: The mod constantly checks your armor slots (On player tick update) to ensure the effect is active only while wearing the enchanted gear.  

Visual Comfort: Configured with ambient settings to minimize intrusive particle effects, providing a clean and clear field of view.

## How to Obtain
You can find the Night Witcher enchantment through various vanilla methods, as it is integrated into the standard gameplay loot tables:  

Enchanting Table: Can be obtained by enchanting a helmet directly using Lapis Lazuli and Experience levels.  

Loot Chests: Has a chance to appear as an enchanted book or on armor found in naturally generated structures like Dungeons, Strongholds, or Ancient Cities.  

Trading: Can be found as a tradeable item from Librarian Villagers.  

Fishing: Occasionally found as a "treasure" item while fishing with a Luck of the Sea rod.  

Anvil: You can combine a Helmet with a Night Witcher Enchanted Book using an Anvil to apply the effect.
